title: Add CSV Dataset Download Feature to Jan-Dhan Gateway

requirements.summary: Place the generated CSV file as a static asset in the frontend public directory
acceptanceCriteria: CSV file is placed in frontend/public/assets/ directory
File is accessible via direct URL path
File name clearly indicates it contains 2000 registry records

file_operations.description: Create CSV file containing 2000 synthetic records with schema: Citizen_ID (12-digit unique text), Income_Tier, Scheme_Eligibility, Scheme_Amount (number), Last_Claim_Date (DD-MM-YYYY), Region_Code, Account_Status (Active/Inactive), Aadhaar_Linked (TRUE/FALSE), Claim_Count (0-5). Include data variety with different income tiers, multiple scheme types (Pension, Health, Education), various region codes (e.g., MP-11, GJ-06, RJ-06), mix of Active/Inactive accounts, TRUE/FALSE Aadhaar linkage status, and claim counts ranging from 0 to 5. Ensure realistic Scheme_Amount values (e.g., 2000 for Pension, 5000 for Health).

requirements.summary: Add download link for the CSV dataset in the admin dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Download link/button is clearly visible and labeled
Clicking the link initiates CSV file download
Link includes file size information if possible

file_operations.description: Add a download section in the admin dashboard that includes a clearly labeled button or link to download the jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv file from /assets/jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv. Display the file size (approximately indicating 2000 records) and use appropriate styling consistent with the existing admin dashboard design. Position the download section logically within the existing dashboard layout, potentially near the system status or as a dedicated data export section.
